root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: fix data race for plan cache.

evidence: avoid mutating global PreparedPlanCache* vars in tests; create sessions with per-session PreparedPlanCache option (executor/seqtest/prepared_test.go, session/session.go)
